subcodes.first_line: O companion of my travels! … The great Qa’im-Maqam has said, “The body of the mulla is the object of God’s ridicule,”
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس سفر من هر چند جواب نامه مرقوم و ارسال گردید ولی حال دوباره از شدت محبت
subcodes.subjects: @universal peace; world unity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prophecy and fulfillment
